rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CHRISTINE YOUNG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
rulings.Rulings: continued to november 16, 2016. although the examiner asked for a supplemental declaration, petitioner filed an amended petition. an amended petition requires the same notice of hearing (including pubication) as the petition it amends (see CRC 7.53.a.). this matter continued for petitioner to re-publish and give notice of the amended petition.
